Heavenly Father,
As Hurricane Milton approaches, we turn to you with heavy hearts and a sense of urgency. We ask for your divine protection over all of us in its path. Surround us with your comforting presence and grant us the strength to face the challenges ahead.
Please watch over families, friends, and communities as they prepare and seek safety. Instill in us a spirit of resilience and hope, even as the storm looms. We pray for first responders and emergency workers, that they may be kept safe as they serve and protect those in need.
Lord, may your peace be felt in the hearts of those who are anxious and fearful. Help them find comfort in one another and in the knowledge that they are not alone. As the winds and rains come, we ask for your guidance and support for all those affected, that we may be able to rebuild and recover.
We trust in your mercy and grace, and we seek your protection over every life touched by this storm. Amen.
